translation.welcome: Welcome to the Car Pack Comparator
translation.error_loading_data: Error loading data. Please try again later.
translation.introduction_text: This tool helps you compare different car equipment packages. Use the dropdowns to select packs and see a detailed comparison.
translation.header_subtitle: Comparison by exact feature text grouped by category.
translation.matrix_hint: x means the feature exists in the pack.
translation.tutorial_step1_text: This section provides a high-level summary of the features in each pack.
translation.tutorial_step2_text: Select two packs to see a detailed side-by-side comparison of their features.
translation.tutorial_step3_text: This matrix shows all features and which packs include them.
